name: workItems.moveToColumn
description: Move a work item to a different column by column_id or status_mapping. Useful for updating work item status after execution.

work_item_id.description: ID of the work item to move (required)

column_id.description: Target column ID. Either column_id or status_mapping must be provided.

status_mapping.description: Target status - finds column with matching status_mapping. Either column_id or status_mapping must be provided.

position.description: Position within the target column (0 = top)

user_id.description: User ID performing the action (for audit logging)

actor_role.description: Role of the actor (for audit logging)

actor_surface.description: Surface the action is performed from (e.g., 'mcp', 'web', 'cli')

item.description: The updated work item object with new column_id

error.description: Error message if success is false

examples.name: Move to In Progress at top
